block1.comment: bit3_m33ec77ca HW=55 W-witness from F93 corpus (top-10 lowest). Verified UNSAT in F94 cert-pin batch (10/10 UNSAT, 3-solver agreement). Used here as block-1 input to test F104 simulator's FORWARD_BROKEN detection on a non-trivial residual.

chain_state_input.comment: Block-1 produces non-zero working-state residual (HW=55), which becomes a distinct post-feed-forward chain-input diff to block 2. Block-2 with no message diff cannot absorb it; SHA-256 compression amplifies the diff and verdict should be FORWARD_BROKEN per F104 simulator.

target_diff_at_round_N.comment: All-zero collision target. Test fixture: block-2 with no W2 constraints CANNOT achieve this target from a non-zero block-1 residual. F104 should detect this and return FORWARD_BROKEN verdict.

metadata.purpose: F106 test fixture: validates F104 simulator's FORWARD_BROKEN detection on a non-trivial bundle (block-1 residual HW=55, block-2 with no constraints, all-zero target). Expected verdict: FORWARD_BROKEN with block-2 final HW ≈ 55.
